overall.description: A cinematic drone flight through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, showcasing densely packed neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and atmospheric haze. The footage is clearly from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring vibrant pink, red, and blue neon lighting against dark rainy streets below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop panoramic view of neon city skyline

agents.ego_description: piloting drone steadily forward over city rooftops at high altitude, capturing the sprawling neon skyline

entered.detail: partial neon sign with orange letters visible on left side of frame
tall palm tree silhouette against the night sky on the right edge
tall skyscraper with distinctive vertical red neon lighting strips
multiple glowing holographic advertisements floating between buildings
white steam or smoke rising from vents in the city below
skyscraper with distinctive red crown lighting on top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude drone shot overlooking a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night. Neon signs and holographic advertisements illuminate the skyline, with a prominent red-lit tower in the distance and a palm tree silhouetted on the right. The atmosphere is hazy with smoke rising from the streets below.

events.description: palm tree and initial rooftop sign exit frame as drone advances past starting vantage point
drone begins gradual descent while maintaining forward momentum through building clusters

agents.ego_description: descending through upper city levels while navigating between skyscrapers, revealing new corporate architecture

entered.detail: building with prominent ORBITAL AIR signage in red neon letters
tower featuring large circular corporate logo near the top
distant street lights and traffic visible far below

segments.scene_description: The drone moves past the initial vantage point, leaving the palm tree behind as it descends through the upper levels of the city. The Orbital Air building becomes visible on the right, while the red neon tower grows larger in the center. Street lights become visible far below as the altitude decreases.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with close building proximity

events.description: entering narrower corridor between towers with orbital air signage now prominent on right
large holographic vote billboard becomes clearly visible on building facade ahead

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through tight spaces between neon-lit corporate buildings while descending toward street level

entered.detail: large vertical holographic billboard displaying VOTE text with portrait
building with distinctive architectural features on the left side

segments.scene_description: The drone descends into a dense urban canyon between towering skyscrapers, with buildings now filling most of the frame. The Orbital Air building looms large on the right, while a prominent VOTE holographic billboard appears ahead. Street traffic becomes visible as light trails far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower altitude street approach with prominent political advertising

events.description: drone slows approach to examine vote billboard details closely while maintaining forward motion

agents.ego_description: slowing to hover near large vote billboard while observing street level traffic and building details below

entered.detail: close-up view of building windows and architectural details on left
tall building facade passing by on the right side

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the drone approaches the VOTE billboard closely, revealing its detailed holographic display. The camera moves between tightly packed buildings at lower altitude, with street traffic visible as light streams below. The scene focuses on the immersive details of the cyberpunk city architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drone descent from a high-altitude panoramic view of a neon-lit skyline into the claustrophobic depths of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins overlooking a hazy cityscape where holographic advertisements and a distant red-lit tower glow against the night, with a silhouetted palm tree framing the right side of the view. As the camera descends, the palm tree recedes and the Orbital Air building emerges on the right, while the red tower grows more prominent and the distant street lights begin to sharpen. The scene then shifts into a dense corridor of towering skyscrapers that fill the frame, bringing the Orbital Air structure into close proximity as a massive VOTE holographic billboard appears ahead. Finally, the camera glides closer to the detailed holographic display, weaving between tightly packed architecture as the street traffic below transforms into flowing streams of light.
